scripts.prepare-secret: cat auth.json | base64 -w 0 && echo '\n\n✅ Copy the above base64 string and paste it as AUTH_JSON secret in GitHub'
scripts.show-secret: echo '📌 AUTH_JSON secret setup:' && echo '1. Run: npm run prepare-secret' && echo '2. Copy the output' && echo '3. Go to: GitHub repo → Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions' && echo '4. Click New repository secret' && echo '5. Name: AUTH_JSON' && echo '6. Value: [paste the base64 string]'
